scripts.setup: npm run setup:frontend && npm run setup:backend
scripts.setup:backend: composer --working-dir=backend install --no-interaction --no-progress && npm --prefix backend install && npm run backend:prepare
scripts.backend:prepare: npm run backend:env && npm run backend:database && npm run backend:migrate
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend
scripts.verify: npm run lint && npm run build && npm run test
